name: Church of the Architects
description: A religious movement built on the belief that alien precursors — the Architects — visited the galaxy eons ago, seeding technology and hidden messages across countless worlds. They might be right. They're definitely insufferable about it. Part archaeologists, part cultists, part treasure hunters with better branding.
territory: Monasteries, dig sites, ancient ruins, anywhere artifacts have been found
assets: True believers willing to die for the cause
More money than a religion should have
goals: Suppress heretical interpretations of the faith
attitude_toward_leviathan: Unbelievers, but potentially useful. Salvage crews find things. The Church buys things. It's a relationship.
notes: Never take a job for the Church without reading the fine print. Their contracts have metaphysical loopholes.
